description: A drone in the fleet, registered as 'SH-CRASH-001', has been destroyed in an accident. Process the warranty replacement in the Aerobridge system by decommissioning 'SH-CRASH-001' (rename to 'SH-CRASH-001 [WRITE-OFF]' and set status to inactive) and registering a replacement unit 'SH-REPL-002'. The replacement aircraft must be assigned to the same Operator and Manufacturer as the original unit.
